channel.title: Infrastructure on Franz
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure on Franz

item.title: Hello, World: Building a Go-Powered Blog from Scratch
item.description:
Trying to set up a personal blog is not quite straightforward. There was no one stop guide for setting up one using github pages. After solving the issue, i decided to document the steps i followed for my future self and anyone who ends up in the same position as I was.

Hugo

Written in Go, Hugo treats content like source code. It takes Markdown, runs it through Go’s html/template engine, and spits out a static site in milliseconds.
